title: DfE Update: 3 September 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Information High-risk employer policy updated   Reminder Foundation apprenticeships survey   Your feedback Help us to shape the future of education estate management     Latest for academies     Article Title     Action Reopening of the PE and sport premium digital expenditure reporting return   Action Access the writing framework: guidance on how to teach writing published 8 July 2025   Your feedback Help us to shape the future of education estate management   Events and webinars RPA Members only workshop: Risk assessment and competent person workshop   Events and webinars DfE Auditor webinar on automating the accounts return   Events and webinars DfE Auditor webinar on automating the accounts return   Events and webinars Writing framework information webinar for leaders     Latest for local authorities     Article Title     Action Reopening of the PE and sport premium digital expenditure reporting return   Action Access the writing framework: guidance on how to teach writing published 8 July 2025   Reminder Foundation apprenticeships survey   Your feedback Help us to shape the future of education estate management   Events and webinars RPA Members only workshop: Risk assessment and competent person workshop   Events and webinars Writing framework information webinar for leaders    "
